title: Atlas Stage Focus
summary: Added atlasStage routing, section stage tags, and focus gates so Cockpit, Map, Bots, Feed, Worlds, and Assets each reveal their matching stage while All remains the full audit stack.
proof: Added atlasStage state, defaults, hash routing, and teleport activation so the rail selects a focused stage.
Tagged dashboard sections with reusable stage labels and hid non-matching stages outside the All audit deck.
Updated README, cache markers, snapshot generation, and regression floors so the standalone dashboard records the stage-focus unlock.
